use_cases: Text alignment selection in rich text editors and document tools
View mode toggling between different display options
Filter or category selection in toolbars and settings panels
Format style selection in content creation interfaces
Single or multi-select option groups in forms
ai_summary: A minimalist segmented toggle group component that provides a horizontal set of toggle buttons for single or multiple option selection. Built with accessibility in mind using ARIA labels and keyboard navigation support, featuring hover, focus, active, and pressed states. Commonly used in text editing toolbars, settings interfaces, and any interface requiring compact option selection.
